name: Sean Tsai
about: Hi I'm Sean. I’m a software engineer specialising in web development, with a focus on building intuitive user interfaces and writing maintainable, scalable code. Outside of programming, you can usually find me on the tennis court or keeping an eye on the latest stock market trends.

experience.intro: Maintained reusable React components for the Yahoo Taiwan news ecosystem, focusing on code reliability and UI consistency.

projects.title: Cross-Platform Sales Application & Analysis Dashboard
projects.intro: A custom cross-platform application for a seafood importer company to manage customer orders, and used the data as analysis sources for an analysis dashboard to categorise different customer types, find products with high growth potential, and pointed out low ROI customers. The system used a layered data workflow which separating application, operational, and analytics layers, archiving historical data to the warehouse to maintain application performance and enable scalable BI reporting.

projects.title: Business Analysis Dashboard
projects.intro: An internal management dashboard for a seafood importer company to visualise financial performance metrics and improve analysis efficiency. Created an order parsing workflow by connecting with LINE Messaging API and used OpenAI API to parse messages to a structured JSON format.

projects.title: Personal Website
projects.intro: A clean, minimalist personal portfolio website.

projects.title: Presentation Website
projects.intro: A responsive presentation website that allows users to create, edit, and preview slideshow decks with rich content, including text, images, and syntax-highlighted code blocks.
